name: Telegram bot foundation
description: Worker bot foundation with webhook secret verification, Telegram API adapter, Telegram identity-to-user lookup, no token persistence, and /start + /help linked/unlinked behavior.

done: Migration 0002_telegram_bot_foundation.sql adds telegram_bot_chats table (no token columns).
Webhook secret required via readRequired; route always verifies; invalid secret returns 401.
Route resolves Telegram identity before chat upsert and populates user_id for linked users; unlinked users get Open App guidance only.
Telegram API isolated to telegram-client.ts adapter; domain handlers return pure BotResponse.
/start shows menu buttons for linked users; /help explains bot/TMA boundary.
Oracle review approved after blocker fixes (webhook secret required, user_id populated, silent catches replaced with console.error).
verification: ./init.sh test -> 37 tests pass after initial impl; grew with downstream slices.
Oracle review ses_110b72317ffe9rn8njFiAoI5nS approved with warnings only.

notes: First implementation slice. Must not store app access/refresh tokens in bot tables.
